svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 135px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 61px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 80px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- user: AppUser?
- token: String?
- isLoading: bool
- isInitialized: bool
- errorMessage: String?

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 157px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 112px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
+ initialize()
+ login(email, pass): bool
+ loginWithGoogle(): bool
+ register(...): bool
+ logout()
+ updateProfile(...): bool
+ isAdmin: bool

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 435px;
